default.title: Eldoksh - Luxury Car Sales & Acquisition
default.description: Premium destination for luxury car sales and acquisition in Egypt. Certified inspection and flexible financing for the world's finest vehicles.
default.keywords: luxury cars Egypt, buy car Egypt, Eldoksh, Mercedes for sale, BMW for sale, car financing Egypt

home.title: Home
home.description: Discover the finest luxury car collection in Egypt. Eldoksh offers certified premium vehicles with exceptional financing and inspection services.

fleet.title: Luxury Fleet
fleet.description: Browse our exclusive collection of luxury and sports cars for sale. Each car is 200-point inspected with warranty options.

sell.title: Sell Your Car
sell.description: Sell your luxury or sports car to Eldoksh at the best market value. Professional appraisal and instant inspection.

about.title: About Us
about.description: Learn about Eldoksh, Egypt's premier luxury car dealership. Our mission is to provide excellence, luxury, and peace of mind.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Get in touch with Eldoksh for inquiries about buying or selling luxury cars. We are here to assist you.

about.title: About Eldoksh
about.subtitle: Egypt's Premier Luxury Car Dealership
about.story1: Eldoksh Dealership began with a simple vision: to bring the world's finest luxury cars to the Egyptian market with unmatched quality standards. Over the years, we have built a reputation based on trust and reliability in the luxury auto world.
about.story2: We don’t just sell cars; we provide a complete ownership experience starting from your first visit to our showroom until after-sales service. Our dedicated team always aims to ensure your absolute satisfaction and provide options matching your ambition.
about.visionDesc: To be the first and only destination for anyone seeking excellence, luxury, and peace of mind in the automotive world in Egypt.
about.missionDesc: Delivering exceptional services, ensuring the highest standards of inspection for our vehicles, and providing innovative financing solutions that make owning a luxury car a reality.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.introduction: At Eldoksh, we value your privacy. This policy explains how we collect and use your data.

sections.title: Data Collection
sections.content: We collect information you provide directly to us when registering, booking a car, or contacting support.

sections.title: Data Usage
sections.content: Your data is used to process bookings, verify identity, and improve our services.

sections.title: Security
sections.content: We use industry-standard encryption to protect your personal and payment information.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.introduction: By using Eldoksh services, you agree to these legal terms.

sections.title: Eligibility
sections.content: Users must be of legal age and possess a valid driver's license for rental services.

sections.title: Booking & Payments
sections.content: All bookings are subject to availability and payment verification.

sections.title: Liability
sections.content: Eldoksh is not liable for indirect damages arising from the use of our vehicles.
